ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the job category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent job category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the job role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job role */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job category the role belongs to */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., full-time, part-time, contract) */,
  "experience_required" INTEGER /* Minimum years of experience required for the job role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_roles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job role being posted */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the job was posted */,
  "number_of_postings" INTEGER /* Number of postings for the job role */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the job belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES job_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projected_growth" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projected growth entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job role */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the growth rate applies to */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Projected growth rate for the job role */,
  "growth_factor" TEXT /* Factor contributing to growth (e.g., technological advancements, industry trends) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projected_growth_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES job_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "estimated_postings" (
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimated posting entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job role */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the estimated postings apply to */,
  "estimated_postings" INTEGER /* Estimated number of postings for the job role */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the estimation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimated_postings_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES job_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "average_time_to_fill" (
  "fill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each average time to fill entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job role */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the average days to fill apply to */,
  "average_days_to_fill" INTEGER /* Average days to fill the job role */,
  "fill_rate" REAL /* Fill rate for the job role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_time_to_fill_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES job_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "average_salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each average salary entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job role */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the average salary applies to */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary for the job role */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_salaries_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES job_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., job seeker, career advisor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job role being recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the job recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_recommendations_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES job_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "required_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each required skill */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job role */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the required skill */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Level of the required skill (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_required_skills_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES job_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_skills" (
  "user_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user skill */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill possessed by the user */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Level of the skill possessed by the user (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_skills_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES required_skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_paths" (
  "path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career path */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job role */,
  "previous_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous job role in the career path */,
  "career_path_name" TEXT /* Name of the career path */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_career_paths_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES job_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_career_paths_previous_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_role_id") REFERENCES job_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry trend */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job role affected by the trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry trend */,
  "trend_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the trend on the job role (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_trends_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES job_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_market_insights" (
  "insight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job market insight */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job role related to the insight */,
  "insight_name" TEXT /* Name of the job market insight */,
  "insight_description" TEXT /* Description of the job market insight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_market_insights_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES job_roles ("role_id")
)
